Author:

[mwa0000038714556](https://thingspeak.mathworks.com/users/mwa0000038714556)

AirBuddy is an ESP8266-based indoor monitoring system that measures temperature, humidity, and normalized air quality (0–100) using DHT22 and MQ-135 sensors.
